mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.do_id, t0.do_type, t0.property_id, t0.property_state, t0.property_tag, t0.remark
mapper.select: select ,oi.operation_date,pi.follow_up_person,pi.property_name from property_info pi inner join property_bill t0 on pi.id = t0.do_id inner join operation_info oi on oi.id = t0.do_id and pi.is_deleted = 0 where do_type = 'OPERATION_INFO' and pi.is_deleted = 0
